scope: custom: combat + derived_stats -- R8 defect-immune equal-value harness (armature reset 2026-05-29)
note: Rebuilt parity harness replacing R6/R7's corrupted drivers. Defect-immune: self-contained on validated unit modules (R1/R2/R5 + M1/M5/M7), NOT importing R6/R7's build/driver code; builds hardcoded + asserted to budget 18 at construction AND before every matchup; all results to JSON read from file (never piped stdout); builds deep-copied into every call. TRUSTWORTHY VERDICT (supersedes all prior session field-rates): with budgets asserted, Str 85% DOMINANT (over-tuned -- R5 channels stack: bind+armour-defeat+stagger+heavy-weapon-access+pressure), Reading 49% / Agi 58% / End 43% cluster reasonably, Spirit 12% DEAD (its only combat channel is stamina reserves, which rarely bind in a short decisive phrase). This is the INVERSE of the earlier corrupted 'Str dead' artifact. FINDINGS (Jordan-calibration / design): (1) Str channel magnitudes over-weighted -- the cross-attribute value is Jordan's calibration once the mechanism is right; (2) Spirit needs a SECOND combat channel (stamina alone is too thin) -- a design decision, not a seed. Class A = canonical budget (params/core). Class C = decisive-frame + channel seeds (sim-tunable; ledgered in R5/R6). Class M = sweep-method. Reuses R1/R2/R5 (already ledgered). No canon file edited.

entries.quoted_text: Six combat-active attributes at average 3 = baseline budget 18 (the equal-budget invariant asserted on every build).
decisive sub-action Ob = 3 (Difficult); degree band canonical, the choice of 3 is the seed.
6-10s phrase = a few exchanges; 5 sub-actions. Jordan fixed the 6-10s phrase; the count is the seed.
commit depth 4 (toward Committed/Full); M5 depth scale is Class-B, the choice of 4 is the seed.

entries.class: C-proposed (channel seed; tuned down toward equal value; sim-tunable)
entries.quoted_text: Str physical-pressure control dsig per point = LEVEL_SIGMA[minor]/8; tuned down to reduce Str over-dominance.

entries.class: C-proposed (channel seed; tuned up toward equal value; sim-tunable)
entries.quoted_text: Reading dsig per mental point = (LEVEL_SIGMA[minor]+LEVEL_SIGMA[moderate])/2 = 0.375; raised to bring Reading to parity (~49%).
a heavy/committed action every Nth sub-action -- harness mix, not a game constant.
